                                           +--------------------------[  Left Group  ]+
+---------------------[  Right Group  ]+   |                                          |
|                                      |   |  +----------+                            |
|                   +------------------o---o--+  Node B  |<------+                    |
| +----------+      |                  |   |  +----------+       |      +----------+  |
| |  Node D  |<-----+                  |   |                     +------+  Node A  |  |
| +----------+      |   +----------+   |   |                     |      +----------+  |
|                   +---+  Node C  |<--o---o---------------------+                    |
|                       +----------+   |   |                                          |
|                                      |   |                                          |
|                                      |   |                                          |
+--------------------------------------+   |                                          |
                                           +------------------------------------------+
